query: SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM statistics GROUP BY type;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ocoPq9UKt9MVUJb.root --database cF5vY7QXosm6HAcTf29xyM --execute SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM statistics GROUP BY type;
